name: lightgraph
description: High-performance HTML canvas network visualization: batched rendering, viewport culling, and modeless interaction keep graphs with tens of thousands of edges smooth

scripts.sync-assets: cp lightgraph.js python/lightgraph/assets/lightgraph.js && cp lightgraph.js R/inst/assets/lightgraph.js && cp lightgraph.js docs/source/_static/demo/lightgraph.js
scripts.check-assets: diff -q lightgraph.js python/lightgraph/assets/lightgraph.js && diff -q lightgraph.js R/inst/assets/lightgraph.js && diff -q lightgraph.js docs/source/_static/demo/lightgraph.js

author: Hao Zhu
